story.intro: Hey-hey! Big dispatch today, but the whole route's scrambled. Every turn's wrong. Let's put this neighborhood back together!
story.headline: Dispatch 10
story.chapterStart: Hmm… whoa. This is the most mixed up I've seen it. But I know every inch of this place. We've got this.
story.completion: HA! That's the biggest fix yet. Full dispatch, every corner covered. We're unstoppable!

clues.text: Alright! First road's back in place.
Good. That corner was really bugging me.
Hmm-hmm… there's the familiar stretch. Wide open now.
Yes! That was the tough one. Feels great.
More than halfway. The shift's taking shape.
One more piece and I can run the whole thing.
BOOM! Every single road connects. Best dispatch yet!
